name: Stressed Out
short_description: Nothing better than smashing stuff in VR when you're stressed out. Go in, destroy whatever you want, shoot some enemies, have a good time. You don't even need to reload your weapons!
detailed_description:
Had a tough day? Jump in, sit back and relax. Or destroy whatever you want, shoot some enemies, have a good time. You don't even need to reload your weapons!

Stressed Out is an open world sandbox built for VR with fully destructible environment.

You can find me at:

Features:

  • Full Body Presence (no floating hands)
  • Destructible Open World
  • 12 weapons with haptic feedback
  • Jetpack!
  • Realistic Destruction Physics
  • 24 hour day and night cycle
  • PvE
  • Multiplayer (if I can figure it out)

Movement:

  • Smooth / Snap Turn
  • Continuous Movement
  • Jump
  • Double Jump!

I hope you enjoy your time!
